item.title: ACM SIGSAC Featured My Work on LinkedIn
item.description:
I was featured by the ACM Special Interest Group on Security, Audit, and Control (SIGSAC) on LinkedIn.

Feature link:

item.title: DeepLeak Accepted at IEEE SaTML
item.description:
Our latest paper “DeepLeak: Privacy Enhancing Hardening of Model Explanations Against Membership Leakage” is accepted to the IEEE Conference on Secure and Trustworthy Machine Learning (IEEE SaTML).

Congrats to Firas, Zain, and Philemon!

item.title: Keynote at IEEE SaTC 2026
item.description: I will be giving a keynote at the IEEE Conference on Secure and Trustworthy CyberInfrastructure for IoT and Microelectronics (SaTC 2026) in Houston, TX.
